document_title: Tripartite Guidelines on Flexible Work Arrangement Requests

logic_chunks.description: Employers MUST provide a written decision within 2 months.
logic_chunks.rule: Employers must consider FWA requests properly and communicate the decision in writing to the employee within 2 months from receiving the request.

logic_chunks.description: Rejections must be based on reasonable business grounds (e.g., cost, productivity) and NOT personal bias.
logic_chunks.rule: Employers who reject FWA requests must do so based on reasonable business grounds. They should not reject requests based on personal bias or other unreasonable grounds.
reasonable_grounds_examples: Detrimental impact on quality or ability to meet customer demand
Impracticality of reorganising work among existing staff or hiring new staff
unreasonable_grounds_examples: Management does not believe in FWAs
Supervisor prefers to see employees in the office
It's the organisation's tradition not to have FWAs
